title: Create Together
description: A simple and bare bones modpack made to play Create together!
body:
Welcome to **Create Together**. a modpack focusing on playing the famous [Create mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) together with frends.


> 
> ## Key features
> Amongst other smaller client-side mods, it features quality-of-life server-side mods like:
> 
> - [**Travelers Backpack**](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack) :
>   A backpack mod with unique and upgradeable backpacks.
> - [**Natures Compass**](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-compass) :
>   Allows you to locate biomes anywhere in the world.
> - [**Dungeons And Taverns**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns) :
>   Adds many new structures to find when you explore your world.
> 
> - ### Play together with frends
> This modpack makes it easy to play together with frends using the [Essential mod.](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)                                                                     
> It even includes an in-game voice chat that uses proximity chat, called [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)!
> 
> 
> - ### Performance Optimizations
> The modpack also includes **8** performance-boosting mods which should greatly enhance your  performance
>


## Why only 1.20.1?
1.20.1 is the newest version of Create at the moment. I will try to keep this modpack up to date when Create decides to update

## Make it your own!
Mostly, I think the modpack is a good base to build upon.                                                       
Feel free to add any of your favorite mods that you are missing.

Here are some examples of mods that would be fun to add:

- [Xaeros Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) :
  Displays a map of the nearby world terrain in the corner of your screen. (client side)
- [Do a Barrel-roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll) :
  Microsoft flight simulator for Minecraft elytras. (client side)
- [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) :
  New Biomes, mysterious rituals and Mobs for your End
- [Better Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) :
  More Biomes, More Mobs, More Tools for the fiery Dimension
- [Other Create mods!](https://modrinth.com/mods?q=Create&g=categories:fabric&v=1.20.1) :
  Create also has many addons that i would recommend





<details>
<summary>Mod List:</summary>

**This is the Fabric mod list. The Forge version is basically the same, just with different fps mods and [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) missing**

```
```
_**-- | 28 mods | -- | 1 Resource Pack | -- | 1 Shader | --**_

### Server Side Mods:
1. [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) :
 Building Tools and Aesthetic Technology
2. [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack) :
 nique and upgradeable backpacks
3. [Nature's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-compass) :
 Allows you to locate biomes anywhere in the world
4. [Dungeons And Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns)
 Adds many new structures to find when you explore your world.

### Client side mods:
1.  [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) :
  Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed
2.  [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) :
  A modern shader pack loader for Minecraft (makes shaders possible) 
3.  [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) :
  A Sodium addon that adds features that shouldn't be in Sodium.
4.  [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) :
  Alternative Options Menu for Sodium
5.  [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) :
  A Fabric mod that allows for efficient connected textures
6.  [Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dynamic-lights) :
  Supported entities and items such as torches or lanterns emit light!
7.  [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) :
  A working voice chat in Minecraft!
8.  [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) :
  Enhanced Minecraft features in one simple mod (play minecraft multiplayer)
9.  [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) :
  Shows information about what you are looking at (good for Create)
10. [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) :
  View Items and Recipes (good for Create)

```
```
   
### Performance Mods:
1. [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
2. [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
3. [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
4. [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
5. [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)
6. [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
7. [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)
8. [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium)

### APIs:

1. [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
2. [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
3. [Cardinal Components API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cardinal-components-api)
4. [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)
5. [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
6. [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

```
```

### Resource Pack
1. [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

### Shaders
1. [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)

</details>

---
